chapter.title: Gospel and Epistle readings
chapter.rubric: Lectio epistolae beati Pauli apostoli ad Romanos
chapter.incipit: Paulus servus Christi Iesu vocatus apostolus
chapter.note: Temporal (feasts of Christ) and Sanctoral (feasts of the saints) are combined; full text of the Epistle readings; incipits are provided only for Gospel readings

chapter.title: Common of the saints
chapter.rubric: In vigilia omnium apostolorum. Lectio libri sapientiae
chapter.incipit: Beatus vir qui inventus est sine macula

chapter.title: Added lections for masses
chapter.incipit: In diebus illis vidit civitatem sanctam
chapter.note: Texts added in the eleventh century: fol. 360r: Apoc. 21:2-5, dedication of a church; fol. 360v: Mal. 3:1-4, purification of the Virgin; fols. 361r-v: 2 Cor. 3:4-9, week 13 after Pentecost
